ksa_text: Design comprehensive Test and Evaluation Master Plans for AI systems, including test strategy, scope, methodologies, and resource allocation.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop software system testing and validation procedures, programming, and documentation.

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations for providers of general-purpose AI models

nice.top_element_label: Create system testing and validation procedures and documentation

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Obligations for providers of general-purpose AI models
Develop software system testing and validation procedures, programming, and documentation.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-T-003 (RM, Task) maps to Citizen Data Scientist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5427 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.543, eu_ai_act=0.522, dcwf=0.423. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA RM-T-003 with composite 0.5427 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5427 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the RM domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. RM domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5427 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-T-003 (composite 0.5427) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.5427 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.5427 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5427, domain RM. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
